jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at T.I.M.E.
jsonLd.description:
Join the T.I.M.E. family as a Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About T.I.M.E.:
T.I.M.E. is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E.!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
